title: Cobblemon: Capture PC Heal
description: Cobblemon side mod that allows you to automatically heal Pokémon when they are captured and sent to the PC.
body:
Instantly heals Pokemon sent to the PC after capture. Designed for modpacks like Cobbleverse where you can access your PC from anywhere, so your new catches are always battle-ready.

Inspired by classic games, this mod ensures your newly caught Pokemon are instantly cared for.
